title: DNeasy Plant DNA Purification
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps (2) 96 plates with sample and necessary reagent. There is a pause during the protocol to refill tips if necessary, as well as to replace the 96 plates on slots 1 and 4 with fresh plates.
steps_raw: This protocol preps (2) 96 plates with sample and necessary reagent. There is a pause during the protocol to refill tips if necessary, as well as to replace the 96 plates on slots 1 and 4 with fresh plates.
Add A1 buffer to second set of plates
